description: Dependency-free broad serving-stack scenarios for order-of-magnitude estimates when provider/model-specific evidence is unavailable. Bounds are scenarios, not confidence intervals.
disclaimer: Illustrative broad range. Prefer model/provider measurements or calibrated packs when available.

grid.source: Broad low/central/high grid-intensity scenarios for unknown serving location.

provenance.note: Combines broad throughput, serving-power, cache-work, and fixed-overhead assumptions. It is deliberately provider-agnostic and intended for rough bounding, not provider attribution.
Use the CodeCarbon regional pack when a defensible serving region can be asserted.
